attributes.headline: Most AI eval dashboards measure the wrong thing
attributes.angle: **The real problem isn't bad metrics—it's that teams optimize for measurable proxies instead of shipping products that users actually keep using.**

attributes.output: **The real problem isn't bad metrics—it's that teams optimize for measurable proxies instead of shipping products that users actually keep using.**

1/ Your eval dashboard shows 94% accuracy. Your users stopped opening the app. These aren't contradictory—they're exactly what happens when you optimize the proxy instead of the thing.
